description_long: This zucchini is elongated and slightly curved, with a bulbous base tapering to a narrower stem end. Its skin is mottled with shades of green and pale streaks, giving it a natural, variegated appearance. The surface is semi-glossy, with subtle ridges and a slightly bumpy texture typical of fresh zucchini. The stem end is rougher and more fibrous, while the main body is smoother and firmer. The overall shape is irregular, with a gentle curve and a plump midsection. There are no visible stickers, labels, or blemishes, and the zucchini appears fresh and intact.
description: A curved, green zucchini with mottled skin and a bulbous base, featuring a semi-glossy, slightly bumpy surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and gentle curve of the zucchini, with the stem on the left and the bulbous base on the right.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded, bulbous base and the mottled green skin pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the elongated body and the tapering toward the stem, with the full length visible.
description_view_3: View from the stem end, emphasizing the fibrous texture of the stem and the curvature of the zucchini body.
attribute_orientation: lying horizontally with the stem on the left and the bulbous base on the right
